title: Basic Cooking Techniques
description: Learn essential cooking techniques such as sautéing, steaming, and boiling.

steps.instruction: To sauté, heat a small amount of oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add your ingredients and stir frequently to cook evenly.
For steaming, place vegetables in a steamer basket over boiling water and cover until tender.
Boiling is done by placing food in water and heating until it cooks through.

safety_tips: Always use a lid when steaming to retain moisture.
Be cautious of hot oil when sautéing.
Ensure food is cooked thoroughly before serving.
